commit_scope: Lift the native host carrier boundary to C-bootstrapped form-cli: add a four-way-proven native-host verb, package it for Android ARM64, and thread its native-host-instance receipt through Android, Mac host, and Mac speech carriers without making Rust JNI the Android default.

commands: coord claim "native host carrier bindings mac windows android"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/http-client.fk form-stdlib/form-cli-ask.fk form-stdlib/line-grammar.fk form-stdlib/voice-traits.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/co-learning.fk form-stdlib/co-learning-stream.fk form-stdlib/mesh-dispatch.fk form-stdlib/surprise-salience.fk form-stdlib/host-sense-organ.fk form-stdlib/speech-organ.fk form-stdlib/native-host-instance.fk form-stdlib/form-cli.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-cli-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/voice-traits.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/co-learning.fk form-stdlib/co-learning-stream.fk form-stdlib/mesh-dispatch.fk form-stdlib/surprise-salience.fk form-stdlib/host-sense-organ.fk form-stdlib/speech-organ.fk form-stdlib/native-host-instance.fk form-stdlib/tests/native-host-instance-band.fk

bash -n experiments/coherence-sense-android/mac-sense-organ.sh && bash -n experiments/coherence-sense-android/mac-speech-organ.sh && bash -n form/build-android-form-cli.sh && bash -n form/build-form-cli.sh && bash -n experiments/coherence-sense-android/build_signed_release.sh && bash -n scripts/verify_android_sense_public_handshake.sh
fourth_arm_outputs: form-cli-band: validate.sh returned 1023 with 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' and '1 ok, 0 divergent -- kernels agree on every sample.'
native-host-instance-band: validate.sh returned 4095 with 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' and '1 ok, 0 divergent -- kernels agree on every sample.'
local_validation.notes: The first Gradle attempt failed before Kotlin because the worktree lacked Android SDK configuration; a gitignored local.properties was added with sdk.dir=/opt/homebrew/share/android-commandlinetools and the focused Android build then passed. The Android ARM64 artifact is gitignored and was proven by file/APK inspection, not committed. The command run from repo root with ./gradlew failed after the native C build because gradlew lives in experiments/coherence-sense-android; rerunning only Gradle from that directory passed. worktree_pr_guard.py reported ready_for_push=True and check_pr_followthrough.py reported stale_codex_prs=0.

ci_validation.notes: CI will run after push/PR. Local proof covers the pure Form four-way bands, native form-cli build, Android ARM64 cross-compile, debug APK packaging, and shell syntax checks.

deploy_validation.notes: This branch changes Form stdlib, Android packaging, carrier scripts, and substrate documentation. Public release asset publishing is intentionally left to the repository PR/deploy flow.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof passed; PR CI, release signing, merge, and public asset publish remain pending.

evidence_refs: form-cli.fk now exposes native-host <platform> <mic> <camera> <screen> <speech_gate> <freq> <surprises> <samples> [message] and returns native-host-instance|... rows from native-host-instance.fk.
form-cli-band.fk proves the new native-host dispatch row four-way at verdict 1023 including fkwu.
build-form-cli.sh now bakes native-host-instance dependencies into self-contained form-cli and honors CC so the same emitted C can be compiled by host clang or Android NDK clang.
build-android-form-cli.sh cross-compiles that C-bootstrapped form-cli for Android ARM64 as libform_cli_exec.so; file proof reported ELF 64-bit ARM aarch64 PIE with /system/bin/linker64.

Android NativeFormCli.kt executes libform_cli_exec.so from nativeLibraryDir, sends native-host over stdin, parses the returned row, and the app uses legacy JNI extraction so the executable is present on disk.

Android CapabilityHeartbeatService and MainActivity include native_host_instance in /sense and mesh heartbeat payloads. MainActivity dashboard now reports the native form-cli host receipt instead of advertising the Rust JNI lane.
Android build scripts now call form/build-android-form-cli.sh; the debug APK contains lib/arm64-v8a/libform_cli_exec.so and no libform_kernel_rust.so line appeared in the APK inspection.
Mac host and speech carriers now add native_host_instance_raw receipts from native form-cli while remaining I/O/measurement carriers.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Android, Mac host, and Mac speech carriers can now surface the same Form-native lifecycle row from a self-contained C-bootstrapped form-cli. Android packages and executes native form-cli by default; Rust JNI remains only a legacy optional comparison adapter.
public_endpoints: no new public endpoints; existing /sense and /api/hati/mesh/organs/heartbeat payloads gain native_host_instance/native_host_instance_raw fields
test_flows: pure Form flow: form-cli native-host dispatch and native-host-instance lifecycle rows agree across Go/Rust/TypeScript/fkwu.
native host flow: local emitted form-cli returns native-host-instance|android|1|1|1|1|1|1|learn-from-surprise|gold for the gold surprise sample.
Android flow: NDK clang builds libform_cli_exec.so as ARM aarch64; Gradle packages it with legacy JNI extraction; debug APK inspection shows libform_cli_exec.so.
carrier flow: Android service/Activity payloads carry parsed native_host_instance JSON; Mac host/speech receipts carry native_host_instance_raw.
